headline: Ford Stock Soars as Wall Street Wakes Up to Its AI Play
summary: Wall Street appeared to be waking up on Friday to  Ford Motor’s  transformation into an AI stock.  Ford stock was on pace for its highest close since August 2022, according to Dow Jones Market Data.  Through Friday, Ford stock was up 18% over the past month.

headline: Ford Surges 8%, Easily Outpaces General Motors and Stellantis: The Detroit Comeback Has a Clear Leader
summary: Shares of Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) are up 8% in midday trading on Friday, decisively outstripping Detroit peers General Motors (NYSE:GM), up 2%, and Stellantis (NYSE:STLA), up 1%. The Dow Jones Industrial Average is participating in the move, gaining 1%, but Ford stock is doing the heavy lifting in the automotive cohort. The bigger reveal ... Ford Surges 8%, Easily Outpaces General Motors and Stellantis: The Detroit Comeback Has a Clear Leader

headline: Ford Might Fail in Europe Again. All Except for This 1 Key Part.
summary: Ford has tried to restructure a few times over the past decades to no avail. But this critical component of its Europe business is thriving, and Ford needs that to continue for this turnaround to gain traction.

headline: Ford Reshapes EV Battery Plans As Valuation Gap And CMO Search Emerge
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) plans to exit its BlueOval SK battery joint venture and take full ownership of both Kentucky battery plants. The company is also starting a search for a new global chief marketing officer after the departure of Lisa Materazzo. These decisions affect Ford's battery investment structure and its senior marketing leadership at the same time. For you as an investor, these updates touch both the production side of Ford's electric vehicle plans and the way the company presents...
